message:
fix(channel+sync+bulkhead): test permit lifecycle and anti-barge verification

mpsc.rs:
  Fix try_reserve_full_when_waiter_queued test: abort the first
  permit before testing try_reserve rejection (was leaking the
  permit). After try_reserve returns Full, poll the queued waiter
  to verify it acquires and abort it too. Same pattern applied
  to the bounded reserve test — explicitly abort acquired permits
  to prevent resource leaks in test teardown.

semaphore.rs:
  Fix try_acquire_respects_fifo_with_available_permits test: after
  dropping the held permit, poll the queued future to verify the
  waiter actually acquires. Previously the test dropped held but
  never confirmed the waiter woke up and received the permit.

bulkhead.rs:
  Add try_acquire_yields_to_queued_entry test that verifies the
  anti-barging behavior end-to-end: acquire → enqueue waiter →
  release → try_acquire fails (waiter has priority) → process_queue
  grants to waiter → waiter is claimable.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
